block.fluidlogistics.fluid_transporter.t: _Transfer_ fluid from one container to another according to the configured _filter_
block.fluidlogistics.multi_fluid_tank.to: _A mysterious artifact from a seafaring engineer_
Can store up to _8 different types_ of fluids simultaneously
block.fluidlogistics.horizontal_multi_fl: Can store up to _8 different types_ of fluids simultaneously
item.fluidlogistics.compressed_storage_t: Right-click on a fluid tank to _transfer fluid_ and _consume_ the compressed storage tank
item.fluidlogistics.portable_stock_ticke: Not linked to a logistics network
item.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.tooltip: A versatile tool for configuring interaction points of mechanical components
item.fluidlogistics.portable_stock_ticke: A portable warehouse manager that can request items and fluids from a linked logistics network
When shift-right-clicking a Stock Link or Stock Ticker
Bind it to that logistics network
Open the portable stock request interface
item.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.tooltip: Can configure the interaction point of the Frogport/Mailbox
When right-clicking a logistics-network compatible component
Can configure the logistics network of that component
create.fluidlogistics.factory_panel.hold: Hold Alt to set the fluid contained in the item
create.fluidlogistics.gauge.request_addi: When restocking, request this much additional fluid
When restocking, no additional fluid is requested
fluidlogistics.configuration.title: Fluid Logistics Configuration
fluidlogistics.configuration.compressedT: Maximum fluid amount the compressed storage tank can hold (in mB)
fluidlogistics.configuration.fluidPackag: Maximum fluid amount a fluid package can hold (in mB); the effective maximum is limited to 9x the current compressed tank capacity
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.mailb: Click a train station to update the connection
Cannot connect to the original train station
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.logis: Displayed members of the current logistics network
Added to the current logistics network
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.packa: This Packager has been restored to default
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.repac: This Repackager has been restored to default
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.addre: The package address is already empty
Cannot clear a package address set by a sign
create.fluidlogistics.clipboard.no_valid: No valid address found in the clipboard
create.fluidlogistics.clipboard.address_: This %s has its address set by a sign and cannot be modified
create.fluidlogistics.hand_pointer.fluid: This Fluid Packager is now force-powered
This Fluid Packager has been restored to default
create.fluid_packager.no_portable_fluid_: Fluid Packagers cannot interface with Portable Fluid Interface directly
fluidlogistics.ponder.fluid_packager.tex: The Fluid Packager can package fluids from fluid tanks into fluid packages
When powered by a redstone signal, it extracts fluid from the tank and packages it into fluid packages
Fluid packages can be picked up and transported just like any other item
Placing a fluid package into the Fluid Packager will unpack it and inject the fluid into the fluid tank
The Fluid Packager cannot accept fluid packages that cannot be fully unpacked
fluidlogistics.ponder.fluid_packager_add: When placing a sign on the Fluid Packager...
Packaged fluid packages will carry a line of text with their address
Package filters route fluid packages based on their addresses
A Mechanical Saw can directly unpack fluid packages into compressed storage tanks
Besides filters, Frogports and Mailboxes can also route fluid packages
Check their Ponder interfaces to learn about their behavior
advancement.fluidlogistics.let_me_point_: Enter selection mode with the Hand Pointer for the first time
